title: Turbopump
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[Kasmin]] produced a three-stage '''turbopump''' that was used to generate the air cushion on [[Mekuun Corporation/Legends|Mekuun Corporation]] [[Swift Assault 5]]s.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
